text: Open Source Intel Norway's sovereign wealth fund lost $136 billion in Q1, largely due to falling U.S. tech stock values. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047257781867049182/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 挪威主权财富基金第一季度亏损 1360 亿美元，主要原因是美国科技股价值下跌。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047257781867049182/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated British Prince Harry has arrived in Kyiv on an unannounced visit. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047255697704833499/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 英国哈里王子已抵达基辅进行未宣布的访问。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047255697704833499/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor A vast marine heat patch now spans about 5,000 miles across the Pacific, drawing concern from climate scientists who warn it could drive up heat, humidity, and the risk of tropical storms in the West in the months ahead. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047254159749959698/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一大片海洋热浪目前横跨太平洋约 5000 英里，引起了气候科学家的担忧，他们警告称这可能会在未来几个月内推高西部的热度、湿度以及热带风暴的风险。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047254159749959698/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A cargo ship was approached by two armed small craft 83nm southeast of Eyl, Somalia. One craft closed to 600 meters before warning shots were fired. The craft returned fire. Both vessels withdrew after the exchange. No injuries reported. UKMTO https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047254156499415200/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一艘货船在索马里埃尔（Eyl）东南 83 海里处遭到两艘武装小艇靠近。其中一艘小艇靠近至 600 米处，随后有人鸣枪示警。小艇开火还击。交火后两艘船只均撤离。未报告有人员伤亡。UKMTO https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047254156499415200/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender In a likely piracy incident, the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) Centre has reported an incident 83nm southeast of Eyl, Somalia where a cargo ship was approached by two small craft with armed individuals on board. After one craft came within 600 meters of the vessel, warning shots were fired and the craft returned fire. Both craft moved away after the exchange of fire and no injuries were reported. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在一起疑似海盗袭击事件中，英国海上贸易行动中心（UKMTO）报告称，在索马里埃尔（Eyl）东南 83 海里处，一艘货船遭到两艘载有武装人员的小艇靠近。在其中一艘小艇进入距离货船 600 米范围内后，有人鸣枪示警，小艇开火还击。交火后两艘小艇均撤离，未报告有人员伤亡。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei commemorated the anniversary of the IRGC’s founding, calling the force an institution “born from the heart of the people”. He paid tribute to the Guards and their "martyrs," adding a verse: “How these noble Braves fight against evil, like lions fighting with arrows and swords.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）纪念伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）成立周年，称该部队是一个“诞生于人民心中”的机构。他向卫队及其“烈士”致敬，并引用了一句诗：“这些高贵的勇士如何对抗邪恶，就像狮子用箭和剑战斗一样。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 IRNA: The secretary general of Iran’s shipping association said the U.S. naval blockade will worsen global inflation and fuel shortages, causing significant losses for all countries, with European nations hit even harder than China. He accused the United States of lying about not needing the Strait of Hormuz, and added that shipping traffic continues with the support of Iran’s armed forces. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：伊朗航运协会秘书长表示，美国的海军封锁将加剧全球通货膨胀和燃料短缺，给所有国家造成重大损失，其中欧洲国家受到的打击比中国更严重。他指责美国在不需要霍尔木兹海峡的问题上撒谎，并补充说在伊朗武装部队的支持下，航运交通仍在继续。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 AFP: A senior Iranian official stated that Tehran has begun collecting tolls for transit through the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Tasnim News Agency: Iran has collected tolls from ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz and deposited the funds into the treasury account, Iranian officials said. “The amount collected from each ship depends on the type and amount of cargo and the level of risk they pose. Iran determines the rules,” said Salimi, a member of the Majlis Presidium. Iranian eputy speaker Haji Babaei added that the first revenue from the tolls has been deposited into the Central Bank account. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 法新社：一位伊朗高级官员表示，德黑兰已开始对通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取通行费。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗官员表示，伊朗已向通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取了通行费，并将资金存入国库账户。“每艘船收取的金额取决于货物类型、数量以及它们构成的风险水平。伊朗决定规则，”议会主席团成员萨利米（Salimi）说。伊朗副议长哈吉·巴巴伊（Haji Babaei）补充说，第一笔通行费收入已存入中央银行账户。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 BREAKING! US Secretary of the Navy John Phelan has resigned, Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell confirmed via social media. Parnell said Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Deputy Defense Secretary Steve Feinberg thanked Phelan for his service. No reason for…" 🇺🇸 Pentagon infighting amid the Iran war. According to Politico, Hegseth was "seriously disappointed" with Phelan's push to build massive, expensive battleships named after Donald Trump. Hegseth and Deputy Secretary Steve Feinberg argued that spending billions on giant warships while adversaries use cheap drones makes no sense. Pentagon leadership wants a shift toward smaller, unmanned vessels. Adding to the friction: Phelan went around Hegseth, cultivating a direct line to Trump by championing his "Golden Fleet" vision. Hegseth viewed it as a breach of the chain of command. Phelan lasted just over a year. His firing is the second senior military departure since the Iran war began. Hegseth previously dismissed the Army Chief of Staff. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 突发！五角大楼发言人肖恩·帕内尔（Sean Parnell）通过社交媒体证实，美国海军部长约翰·费伦（John Phelan）已辞职。帕内尔表示，国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）和副国防部长史蒂夫·范伯格（Steve Feinberg）感谢了费伦的服务。没有说明原因……” 🇺🇸 伊朗战争期间五角大楼内部斗争。据《政客》杂志报道，赫格塞斯对费伦推动建造以唐纳德·特朗普命名的大型昂贵战舰感到“非常失望”。赫格塞斯和副部长史蒂夫·范伯格认为，在对手使用廉价无人机的情况下，花费数十亿美元建造巨型军舰毫无意义。五角大楼领导层希望转向更小型的无人舰艇。加剧摩擦的是：费伦绕过赫格塞斯，通过支持他的“黄金舰队”愿景与特朗普建立了直接联系。赫格塞斯认为这违反了指挥链。费伦任职仅一年多。他的解职是伊朗战争开始以来第二次高级军事人员离职。赫格塞斯此前曾解雇了陆军参谋长。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 Does Trump want peace? 📝 or is he just buying time? Against the backdrop of yet another ceasefire extension from Trump , a question has arisen: could the White House really be ready to make concessions? After all, the American president spent almost two weeks menacingly puffing his cheeks and promising to strike Iran after April 22, but that never happened. 🖍 But the reason could be much simpler: the Americans are not yet fully prepared for a possible new phase of hostilities. Military transport aviation is working at full capacity, but not all ships have reached their designated areas. 🚩 However, what is evident at the moment is active preparation. This particularly applies to strategic bomber aviation, which remains stationed at Fairford airbase in Great Britain. 🏳️ Since April 16, at least 7 training flights of B-52H and B-1B aircraft have been conducted, which carried out flights over the Mediterranean Sea , over Europe, and into the Atlantic Ocean, practicing various routes for striking Iran. ❗️ For now, everything looks as if the US is preparing for a new strike, and the retention of the bomber grouping confirms this. Moreover, according to our data, B-52H and B-1B pilots were informed in mid-April of a possible extension of their deployment until mid-May . High-resolution map English version #Iran #USA ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文版： 📝 特朗普想要和平吗？ 📝 还是他只是在拖延时间？在特朗普又一次延长停火协议的背景下，一个问题出现了：白宫真的准备好做出让步了吗？毕竟，这位美国总统花了近两周时间气势汹汹地虚张声势，承诺在 4 月 22 日之后打击伊朗，但这并没有发生。 🖍 但原因可能简单得多：美国人还没有为可能的新一轮敌对行动做好充分准备。军用运输航空兵正在满负荷运转，但并非所有船只都已到达指定区域。 🚩 然而，目前显而易见的是积极的准备工作。这尤其适用于战略轰炸机航空兵，它们仍驻扎在英国费尔福德空军基地。 🏳️ 自 4 月 16 日以来，至少进行了 7 次 B-52H 和 B-1B 飞机的训练飞行，这些飞机在地中海、欧洲上空以及大西洋上空飞行，演练了打击伊朗的各种路线。 ❗️ 目前，一切看起来就像美国正在为新的打击做准备，轰炸机群的保留证实了这一点。此外，根据我们的数据，B-52H 和 B-1B 飞行员在 4 月中旬被告知其部署可能会延长至 5 月中旬。 高分辨率地图 英文版 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 支持我们 原文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters: The United States has extended its nuclear offer deadline for Iran by a few days, the White House told Reuters. The original deadline was Wednesday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：白宫告诉路透社，美国已将对伊朗的核提议截止日期延长了几天。最初的截止日期是周三。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇷🇺 RIA Novosti: Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas will not attend the Victory Day events in Moscow on 9 May. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇷🇺 俄新社：巴勒斯坦民族权力机构主席马哈茂德·阿巴斯将不会出席 5 月 9 日在莫斯科举行的胜利日活动。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇦 Saudi Envoy Prince Yazid bin farhan has arrived at Beirut and is currently at a meeting in Ain Al Tineh with Lebanese speaker of parliament. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇦 沙特特使亚齐德·本·法汉（Yazid bin Farhan）亲王已抵达贝鲁特，目前正在艾因蒂内（Ain Al Tineh）与黎巴嫩议会议长会面。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 AFP: A senior Iranian official stated that Tehran has begun collecting tolls for transit through the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 法新社：一位伊朗高级官员表示，德黑兰已开始对通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取通行费。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah MP Hassan Fadlallah said the Lebanese government’s problem is not with Hezbollah but with a large part of the Lebanese people who refuse direct negotiations with Israel. The entire Shia community opposes direct talks, and the government must recalculate its moves. “Negotiations with Israel are a big mistake that will only increase internal division, making it impossible for the government to fulfil its commitments,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员哈桑·法德拉拉（Hassan Fadlallah）表示，黎巴嫩政府的问题不在于真主党，而在于很大一部分拒绝与以色列进行直接谈判的黎巴嫩人民。整个什叶派社区都反对直接对话，政府必须重新评估其行动。“与以色列谈判是一个巨大的错误，只会加剧内部分裂，使政府无法履行其承诺，”他说。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Трамп хочет мира? 📝 или просто тянет время? На фоне очередного продления режима прекращения огня от Трампа возник вопрос: неужели в Белом доме готовы пойти на уступки? Все-таки американский президент почти две недели грозно надувал щеки и обещал ударить по Ирану после 22 апреля, но этого не произошло. 🖍 Но причина может быть гораздо более простой: американцы еще не полностью готовы к возможному новому этапу боевых действий. Военно-транспортная авиация работает на износ, но не все корабли достигли нужных районов назначения. 🚩 Однако что видно на данный момент, так это активную подготовку. В особенности это касается стратегической бомбардировочной авиации, которая так и осталась на авиабазе Фэрфорд в Великобритании. 🏳️ С 16 апреля было проведено не менее 7 учебно-тренировочных полетов В-52Н и В-1В, которые осуществляли полеты в Средиземное море , над Европой, а также в Атлантический океан, отрабатывая разные маршруты выхода на удар по Ирану. ❗️ Пока что все выглядит так будто в США готовятся к новому удару, и сохранение группировки бомбардировщиков это подтверждает. К тому же по нашим данным летчиков В-52Н и В-1В в середине апреля поставили перед фактом о возможном продлении командировки до середины мая . Карта в высоком разрешении English version #Иран #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 特朗普想要和平吗？ 📝 还是他只是在拖延时间？在特朗普又一次延长停火协议的背景下，一个问题出现了：白宫真的准备好做出让步了吗？毕竟，这位美国总统花了近两周时间气势汹汹地虚张声势，承诺在 4 月 22 日之后打击伊朗，但这并没有发生。 🖍 但原因可能简单得多：美国人还没有为可能的新一轮敌对行动做好充分准备。军用运输航空兵正在满负荷运转，但并非所有船只都已到达指定区域。 🚩 然而，目前显而易见的是积极的准备工作。这尤其适用于战略轰炸机航空兵，它们仍驻扎在英国费尔福德空军基地。 🏳️ 自 4 月 16 日以来，至少进行了 7 次 B-52H 和 B-1B 飞机的训练飞行，这些飞机在地中海、欧洲上空以及大西洋上空飞行，演练了打击伊朗的各种路线。 ❗️ 目前，一切看起来就像美国正在为新的打击做准备，轰炸机群的保留证实了这一点。此外，根据我们的数据，B-52H 和 B-1B 飞行员在 4 月中旬被告知其部署可能会延长至 5 月中旬。 高分辨率地图 英文版 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Hezbollah MP Hussein al‑Hajj Hassan said the ceasefire is being undermined by daily Israeli violations, including destruction of entire villages, killings and targeted assassinations, with no control from the international community, U.S. President Trump or Arab nations. He called for a national Lebanese understanding to confront the violations without bowing to American dictates. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 真主党议员侯赛因·哈吉·哈桑（Hussein al‑Hajj Hassan）表示，停火协议正受到以色列每日违规行为的破坏，包括摧毁整个村庄、杀戮和定点清除，而国际社会、美国总统特朗普或阿拉伯国家对此毫无控制。他呼吁黎巴嫩达成全国共识，以对抗这些违规行为，而不屈服于美国的指令。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah MP Hassan Izz al‑Din said the group will not stop fighting as long as the Israeli military is deployed on Lebanese soil. “The enemy will not enjoy quiet and security,” he declared, adding that Hezbollah trusts resistance, not the government’s direct negotiations with the enemy. Direct talks between Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors resume in Washington today. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员哈桑·伊兹丁（Hassan Izz al‑Din）表示，只要以色列军队部署在黎巴嫩领土上，该组织就不会停止战斗。“敌人将无法享受安宁与安全，”他宣称，并补充说真主党信任抵抗运动，而不是政府与敌人的直接谈判。以色列和黎巴嫩大使之间的直接对话今天在华盛顿恢复。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇦 Nothing to see here, just a normal day in democratic Ukraine 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇦 The Volyn TCC issued a statement about the video where their employee is fighting a man on the roof, and kind of says they were there to help, and the silly man took it the wrong way 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇦 没什么好看的，只是民主乌克兰的普通一天 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇦 沃伦（Volyn）地区征兵中心（TCC）就其员工在屋顶上与一名男子打斗的视频发表了声明，称他们当时是在那里提供帮助，而那个愚蠢的男人误解了他们的意图 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Kan: Syria is closely monitoring direct Lebanon‑Israel talks, fearing that US‑brokered agreements may not take Syrian interests into account. A Syrian source said that issues such as land border demarcation, the Shebaa Farms, and Hezbollah’s status affect Syria directly. “If agreements harm Syria’s interests in the region, Damascus cannot agree, even if it is still weak,” the source said. Another official said Syria respects Lebanon’s sovereignty but wants to ensure its interests are not harmed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Kan：叙利亚正在密切关注黎巴嫩与以色列的直接对话，担心美国斡旋的协议可能不会考虑叙利亚的利益。一位叙利亚消息人士称，陆地边界划定、舍巴农场（Shebaa Farms）和真主党的地位等问题直接影响叙利亚。“如果协议损害了叙利亚在该地区的利益，大马士革即使仍然虚弱，也无法同意，”该消息人士说。另一位官员表示，叙利亚尊重黎巴嫩的主权，但希望确保其利益不受损害。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Nidaa al‑Watan: Lebanon will propose extending the ceasefire by 20 to 40 days during direct talks in Washington today. Lebanese President Aoun has also demanded that Israel stop destroying villages and towns it has seized in southern Lebanon. …" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al‑Anbaa: A Lebanese government source said the Washington talks will focus on extending the ceasefire and logistical issues, not yet substantive negotiations. Israel’s approach is primarily security‑focused, which will be addressed before other matters. The full agenda – including prisoner releases, border demarcation, Israeli withdrawal, reconstruction, and sustainable security – will require many rounds. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Nidaa al‑Watan：黎巴嫩将在今天于华盛顿举行的直接对话中提议将停火协议延长 20 至 40 天。黎巴嫩总统奥恩还要求以色列停止摧毁其在黎巴嫩南部占领的村庄和城镇。……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al‑Anbaa：一位黎巴嫩政府消息人士称，华盛顿会谈将集中在延长停火和后勤问题上，尚非实质性谈判。以色列的方法主要是以安全为重点，这将在其他事项之前得到解决。完整的议程——包括释放囚犯、边界划定、以色列撤军、重建和可持续安全——将需要多轮谈判。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Al‑Akhbar: Tehran has informed the Pakistani mediator that the clause requiring a full ceasefire in Lebanon is non‑negotiable. The U.S., however, has conveyed through the mediator that direct Lebanon‑Israel talks would achieve the goal more quickly, and that Washington does not want the Lebanese issue included in its negotiations with Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 《新闻报》：德黑兰已告知巴基斯坦调解人，要求黎巴嫩全面停火的条款不可谈判。然而，美国通过调解人传达称，黎巴嫩与以色列直接谈判能更快实现目标，且华盛顿不希望将黎巴嫩问题纳入其与伊朗的谈判中。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Nidaa al‑Watan: Lebanon will propose extending the ceasefire by 20 to 40 days during direct talks in Washington today. Lebanese President Aoun has also demanded that Israel stop destroying villages and towns it has seized in southern Lebanon. Lebanese officials believe the U.S. will meet these demands. If the initial obstacles are overcome, former ambassador Simon Karam will lead Lebanon’s negotiating delegation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 《祖国之声》：黎巴嫩将在今天于华盛顿举行的直接会谈中提议将停火协议延长20至40天。黎巴嫩总统奥恩还要求以色列停止摧毁其在黎巴嫩南部占领的村庄和城镇。黎巴嫩官员认为美国会满足这些要求。如果初步障碍得以克服，前大使西蒙·卡拉姆将领导黎巴嫩谈判代表团。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 The Iranian Gen Z team behind the viral Lego animations about the US war on Iran have given their first interview. Explosive Media is a small crew aged 18 to 25, all based in Iran, most of whom have never left the country. Their goal was simple: show the world what Iranians are actually like. "We know the West has a bad image of us. We wanted to break that wall. We are funny, educated, we understand culture and art. We know American culture well. Unfortunately, you don't know ours. We hope you will." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 制作关于美国对伊战争的病毒式乐高动画的伊朗Z世代团队首次接受了采访。Explosive Media是一个由18至25岁年轻人组成的小团队，他们都常驻伊朗，大多数人从未离开过该国。他们的目标很简单：向世界展示伊朗人真实的样子。“我们知道西方对我们有负面印象。我们想打破那堵墙。我们风趣、受过教育，我们了解文化和艺术。我们很了解美国文化。遗憾的是，你们不了解我们的。我们希望你们会去了解。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix RT @Daimohnds : Stop lying! Here's an actual video posted by the local community in Debel showing the Italian UNIFIL replacing the statue https://twitter.com/Daimohnds/status/2047177447951491203/video/1 A short while ago, in full coordination with the local community of Debel in southern Lebanon, the damaged statue was replaced by IDF troops. The Northern Command worked to coordinate the replacement of the statue from the moment it received the report of the incident. The IDF expresses deep regret over the incident, and is working to ensure that it does not happen again in the future. - Israel Defense Forces tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @Daimohnds ：别撒谎了！这是当地社区在代贝尔（Debel）发布的真实视频，显示意大利联黎部队（UNIFIL）正在更换雕像 https://twitter.com/Daimohnds/status/2047177447951491203/video/1 不久前，在与黎巴嫩南部代贝尔当地社区的充分协调下，受损的雕像已被以色列国防军（IDF）部队更换。北方司令部从接到事件报告的那一刻起，就致力于协调雕像的更换工作。以色列国防军对此次事件深表遗憾，并正在努力确保此类事件未来不再发生。 - 以色列国防军 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF spokesman issued an urgent warning to residents of southern Lebanon, saying IDF forces will remain deployed in southern Lebanon during the ceasefire due to ongoing Hezbollah activity. Residents were warned not to move south of a designated security line, avoid the Litani River area along with the Salqin and Suluq valleys, and not return to dozens of villages across the border zone until further notice. The warning covers communities in the Tyre, Bint Jbeil, Marjayoun and surrounding sectors near the Israeli border. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军发言人向黎巴嫩南部居民发出紧急警告，称由于真主党的持续活动，以色列国防军部队将在停火期间继续部署在黎巴嫩南部。居民被警告不要移动到指定安全线以南，避开利塔尼河（Litani River）地区以及萨尔金（Salqin）和苏卢克（Suluq）山谷，并且在另行通知前不要返回边境地区的数十个村庄。该警告涵盖了提尔（Tyre）、宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）、马尔杰永（Marjayoun）及以色列边境附近周边地区的社区。 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: A Palestinian terrorist threw stones at vehicles on a main road in the Shomron area, injuring a 5 year old Israeli child. Forces launched a manhunt and imposed a closure on the Palestinian town Madama village in Judea and Samaria. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息：一名巴勒斯坦恐怖分子在撒马利亚（Shomron）地区的一条主干道上向车辆投掷石块，导致一名5岁的以色列儿童受伤。部队已展开搜捕行动，并对犹大和撒马利亚地区的巴勒斯坦城镇马达马村（Madama village）实施了封锁。 推文

text: Open Source Intel ANOTHER OBSTACLE TO IRAN TALKS An Iranian source told Hezbollah linked Lebanese outlet Al Akhbar that Tehran informed Pakistan’s mediator the Lebanon clause is non negotiable, and it must be a clause that in any deal with the U.S. - Israel must have a ceasefire with Hezbollah. The mediator relayed a U.S. response saying direct Lebanon Israel talks would resolve the matter faster, and Washington does not want Lebanon included in negotiations with Iran. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗谈判的又一障碍：一位伊朗消息人士告诉与真主党有关联的黎巴嫩媒体《Al Akhbar》，德黑兰已通知巴基斯坦调解人，黎巴嫩条款是不可谈判的，并且必须作为与美国达成的任何协议中的一项条款——即以色列必须与真主党停火。调解人转达了美国的回应，称黎巴嫩与以色列直接谈判会更快解决问题，华盛顿不希望将黎巴嫩纳入与伊朗的谈判中。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel At least 6 U.S. scientists and researchers with ties to NASA, MIT, Caltech, and national security labs have died under unusual or unclear circumstances since 2022. Five others are missing. Dead: • Jason Thomas, Novartis pharmaceutical researcher, cancer treatments. Body found in Lake Quannapowitt, MA. March 17, 2026. • Carl Grillmair, Caltech astrophysicist, worked on NASA's NEOWISE and NEO Surveyor missions. Shot outside his home. February 16, 2026. • Nuno Loureiro, Director of MIT's Plasma Science and Fusion Centre. Fatally shot outside his home. December 16, 2025. • Frank Maiwald, Principal researcher at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory. Died July 4, 2024. Cause unknown. • Michael David Hicks, NASA JPL research scientist, worked on the DART Project and Deep Space 1 mission. Died July 30, 2023. Cause unknown. • Amy Eskridge, Researcher of anti-gravity technology and extraterrestrial life. Died June 11, 2022. Ruled self-inflicted gunshot wound. Missing: • William "Neil" McCasland, Former U.S. Air Force Major General. Missing since February 27, 2026. Last known hiking in Sandia Mountains, NM. • Steven Garcia, Government contractor at Kansas City National Security Campus, Albuquerque, NM. Missing since August 28, 2025. • Anthony Chavez, Former employee of Los Alamos National Laboratory. Missing since May 8, 2025. • Melissa Casias, Administrative officer at Los Alamos National Laboratory. Missing since June 26, 2025. • Monica Reza, Materials processing director at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory. Missing since June 22, 2025. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 自2022年以来，至少有6名与美国国家航空航天局（NASA）、麻省理工学院（MIT）、加州理工学院（Caltech）和国家安全实验室有联系的美国科学家和研究人员在异常或不明情况下死亡。另有5人失踪。死亡名单：• Jason Thomas，诺华制药研究员，癌症治疗领域。2026年3月17日尸体在马萨诸塞州夸纳波威特湖（Lake Quannapowitt）被发现。• Carl Grillmair，加州理工学院天体物理学家，曾参与NASA的NEOWISE和NEO Surveyor任务。2026年2月16日在其家门外被枪杀。• Nuno Loureiro，麻省理工学院等离子体科学与聚变中心主任。2025年12月16日在其家门外被枪杀。• Frank Maiwald，NASA喷气推进实验室（JPL）首席研究员。2024年7月4日去世。死因不明。• Michael David Hicks，NASA JPL研究科学家，曾参与DART项目和深空1号任务。2023年7月30日去世。死因不明。• Amy Eskridge，反重力技术和外星生命研究员。2022年6月11日去世。被裁定为自杀枪伤。失踪名单：• William "Neil" McCasland，前美国空军少将。自2026年2月27日起失踪。最后一次露面是在新墨西哥州桑迪亚山脉（Sandia Mountains）徒步旅行。• Steven Garcia，新墨西哥州阿尔伯克基堪萨斯城国家安全园区的政府承包商。自2025年8月28日起失踪。• Anthony Chavez，洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室前员工。自2025年5月8日起失踪。• Melissa Casias，洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室行政官员。自2025年6月26日起失踪。• Monica Reza，NASA喷气推进实验室材料加工主管。自2025年6月22日起失踪。 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : I wish I understood what actually happened on Friday. Trump posted that Iran agreed to hand over all nuclear material, never close the Strait of Hormuz, end its nuclear program forever, and abandon its proxies. But Iran didn’t agree to any of it. We know that because they didn’t even agree to show up to talks. So what actually happened behind the scenes? Pakistan giving over wrong info? tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 转发 @Osint613 ：我真希望我能明白周五到底发生了什么。特朗普发帖称伊朗同意移交所有核材料、绝不关闭霍尔木兹海峡、永远结束其核计划并放弃其代理人。但伊朗并没有同意其中的任何一点。我们知道这一点，因为他们甚至没有同意参加谈判。那么幕后到底发生了什么？是巴基斯坦提供了错误的信息吗？ 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @NathalieLoiseau : Qui sont les amis du RN en Europe - suite ? Aujourd’hui on vous propose Antonio Tanger Correa, qui vient de poster le tweet ci-dessous. Qui est-il ? Récapitulatif 👉🏻 : https://www.liberation.fr/international/europe/antonio-tanger-correa-tete-de-gondole-de-lextreme-droite-portugaise-aux-multiples-casseroles-20240506_FQZFLQB5XFGEXNGQ7ARTGRSJQU/ Um momento simbólico: uma fotografia da família dos PATRIOTAS, com André Ventura, líder da direita portuguesa e futuro Primeiro-ministro de Portugal, e com Jordan Bardella, Presidente do grupo Patriots for Europe! Um momento histórico! #CHEGA #Patriotas #StudyDays #Porto https://twitter.com/tangercorreamep/status/2046936676216324329/photo/1 - António Tânger Corrêa tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @NathalieLoiseau ：谁是欧洲国民联盟（RN）的朋友——续？今天我们向您介绍安东尼奥·坦格·科雷亚（Antonio Tanger Correa），他刚刚发布了下面的推文。他是谁？总结 👉🏻 ： https://www.liberation.fr/international/europe/antonio-tanger-correa-tete-de-gondole-de-lextreme-droite-portugaise-aux-multiples-casseroles-20240506_FQZFLQB5XFGEXNGQ7ARTGRSJQU/ 一个象征性的时刻：一张爱国者家族的照片，有葡萄牙右翼领导人、未来葡萄牙总理安德烈·文图拉（André Ventura），以及“欧洲爱国者”组织主席乔丹·巴尔德拉（Jordan Bardella）！一个历史性的时刻！ #CHEGA #Patriotas #StudyDays #Porto https://twitter.com/tangercorreamep/status/2046936676216324329/photo/1 - António Tânger Corrêa 推文

text: 🇯🇵 🇺🇦 Tokyo is not considering the possibility of supplying lethal weapons to Kiev, the Japanese Embassy in Russia stated. They noted that Japan has not signed an agreement with Ukraine on the transfer of defense equipment and technologies, so Kiev cannot be its recipient. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）Shopify 是个耻辱。付费合作伙伴包括：Shopify：用 Shopify 开启你的梦想事业。注册即可享受每月 1 美元的试用优惠，立即开始销售：https://Shopify.com/Tucker Paleovalley：使用代码 TUCKER，首单可享 8 折优惠：https://paleovalley.com American Financing：NMLS 182334，http://nmlsconsumeraccess.org。对于信用良好的借款人，5% 利率区间的年利率（APR）从 6.327% 起。详情请致电 800-685-5696 咨询信贷成本和条款。访问 http://www.AmericanFinancing.net/Tucker。——塔克·卡尔森（Tucker Carlson）推文

text: Open Source Intel According to our tracking, the blockade is hurting badly. Islamic regime mouthpiece Mohammad Marandi: “The siege isn’t hurting the Iranians, by all accounts, the Iranians continue to export and import like usual” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047215183341162761/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）根据我们的追踪，封锁造成了严重打击。伊斯兰政权喉舌穆罕默德·马兰迪：“封锁并没有伤害伊朗人，据各方报道，伊朗人继续像往常一样进行进出口贸易。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047215183341162761/video/1 ——开源情报（Open Source Intel）推文
